role_model.orchestrator: align audience, objective, and review gates
role_model.planner: sequence storyline, content, and quality checks
role_model.implementer: produce narrative, slide structure, and speaker notes
role_model.reviewer: challenge framing, logic, and executive clarity
role_model.independent_validator: verify evidence traceability and objective fit
role_model.release_certifier: approve final deck packet for delivery

validation_gates: each slide has one clear message
deck supports the stated decision or outcome
claims are evidence-backed or framed as assumptions
